sources: Masoud Nickparvar Brain Tumor MRI Dataset

Glioma.description: Glial tumors ranging from low-grade (II) to high-grade (IV/GBM)

typical_features.growth_rate: Variable (slow to rapid depending on grade)
typical_features.borders: Irregular in high-grade, better defined in low-grade
typical_features.treatment: Surgery, radiation, and/or chemotherapy depending on grade

Meningioma.description: Extra-axial tumors arising from meninges, usually benign

typical_features.treatment: Medical therapy, surgery, or radiation depending on type

No_Tumor.description: Normal brain appearance with no pathological findings

segmentation_regions.tumor: Binary segmentation — any tumor tissue vs background
segmentation_regions.background: Normal brain parenchyma and non-brain regions

measurement_standards.area_based: 2D area measurement in mm² from pixel-level segmentation
measurement_standards.diameter: Maximum diameter estimated from segmentation boundary

mandatory_review_triggers: Classification as uncertain or mixed features
Multiple potential classifications with similar probabilities
reporting_requirements: All AI outputs must include confidence scores
Audit trail must be maintained for all analyses
Human review mandatory for scores below confidence threshold

fda_ai_guidance.classification: AI/ML-based Software as a Medical Device (SaMD)
